title: stelis exaltata
intro: Stelis exaltata, also known as the "Antillean stelis," is a species of orchid native to the Caribbean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis exaltata include potential relief from pain, fever reduction, and wound healing, as well as antimicrobial properties that can aid in preventing infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis exaltata can be found in the form of infusions, teas, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
